heading: Local governance
label: 7921 Local governance
notes: Effective DateSection effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2015 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2015section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2015 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2015section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this title

children.text: exercise any governance or authority over school administration, including the development and expenditure of school budgets, unless otherwise authorized under this chapter;
issue any regulation without first complying with the rulemaking requirements of ; orsection 553 of title 5
issue any nonregulatory guidance without first, to the extent feasible, considering input from stakeholders.

children.heading: Authority under other law
children.label: b Authority under other law
children.text: Nothing in subsection (a) shall be construed to affect any authority the Secretary has under any other Federal law.
